steps.t: Zemirah is at the Sailors' Guild-hall, Ahûd is at the northern shipyard, and Râmax is at the southern shipyard. Eshmun, Captain of the Haven, wants to…
Eshmun, Captain of the Haven, can be found at the Harbour-warden's Tower in the Sail-haven of Umbar Baharbêl. You have spoken to Zemirah and Ahûd, but…
